$schema_note: This is a documentation mirror of the Twitch dashboard config, not consumed by Twitch. Edit the real values at https://dev.twitch.tv/console/extensions
name: ASCIIMUD
summary: Tactical ASCII overlay synced to the streamer's WoW Classic Era character.
description: Viewers see a richer tactical UI driven by the streamer's ASCIIMUD addon: zone, HP, severity, and per-viewer interactivity.
notes: Update the EBS hostname in viewer.js and config.js before submitting.
